description_long: This chair features a modern, minimalist design with a smooth, continuous white plastic shell forming the seat, backrest, and partial armrests. The seat curves gently upward at the sides, providing subtle support for the arms, while the backrest is broad and slightly reclined for comfort. The chair is supported by four slender, slightly splayed wooden legs, which are attached to the underside of the seat with dark metal brackets. The open space between the seat and backrest adds to the airy, contemporary aesthetic and reduces weight. The overall construction suggests durability and ease of cleaning, making it suitable for high-traffic urban environments. Its neutral color palette and sleek lines allow it to blend seamlessly into both public and private urban spaces.
description: A modern white plastic chair with a curved seat and backrest, supported by four wooden legs and subtle integrated armrests. The design is sleek, minimal, and suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved seat and backrest with an open space below the backrest and the two front wooden legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous curve of the seat and backrest, as well as the splayed angle of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the backrest, the open lower back, and the two rear legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the smooth, sculpted profile and leg positioning.
